ir_specs.statement: ip address add - add new protocol address.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: ip address add - add new protocol address.

ir_specs.statement: dev IFNAME the name of the device to add the address to.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: dev IFNAME the name of the device to add the address to.

ir_specs.statement: local ADDRESS (default) the address of the interface.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: local ADDRESS (default) the address of the interface.

ir_specs.statement: The format of the address depends on the protocol.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The format of the address depends on the protocol.

ir_specs.statement: It is a dotted quad for IP and a sequence of hexadecimal halfwords separated by colons for IPv6.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: It is a dotted quad for IP and a sequence of hexadecimal halfwords separated by colons for IPv6.

ir_specs.statement: The ADDRESS may be followed by a slash and a decimal number which encodes the network prefix length.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The ADDRESS may be followed by a slash and a decimal number which encodes the network prefix length.

ir_specs.statement: peer ADDRESS the address of the remote endpoint for pointopoint interfaces.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: peer ADDRESS the address of the remote endpoint for pointopoint interfaces.

ir_specs.statement: Again, the ADDRESS may be followed by a slash and a decimal number, encoding the network prefix length.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Again, the ADDRESS may be followed by a slash and a decimal number, encoding the network prefix length.

ir_specs.statement: If a peer address is specified, the local address cannot have a prefix length.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If a peer address is specified, the local address cannot have a prefix length.

ir_specs.statement: The network prefix is associated with the peer rather than with the local address.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The network prefix is associated with the peer rather than with the local address.

ir_specs.statement: broadcast ADDRESS the broadcast address on the interface.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: broadcast ADDRESS the broadcast address on the interface.

ir_specs.statement: It is possible to use the special symbols '+' and '-' instead of the broadcast address.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: It is possible to use the special symbols '+' and '-' instead of the broadcast address.

ir_specs.statement: In this case, the broadcast address is derived by setting/resetting the host bits of the interface prefix.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: In this case, the broadcast address is derived by setting/resetting the host bits of the interface prefix.

ir_specs.statement: label LABEL Each address may be tagged with a label string.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: label LABEL Each address may be tagged with a label string.

ir_specs.statement: The maximum allowed total length of label is 15 characters.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The maximum allowed total length of label is 15 characters.
